headline: 2 Healthcare Stocks to Research Further and 1 We Find Risky
summary: Personal health and wellness is one of the many secular tailwinds for healthcare companies. But financial performance has lagged recently as players offloaded surplus COVID inventories in 2023 and 2024, a headwind for overall demand. The result? Over the past six months, the industry’s 1.8% return has trailed the S&P 500 by 9 percentage points.
